params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 m365_copilot FIX-A retest after #731 FAIL_REGRESSION. FIX-A applied at ai_prompt_filter.cpp lines 1812-1828: m365_copilot ws_inject now appends RFC 6455 close frame (status=1000 normal closure, bytes \x88\x02\x03\xE8) AFTER text frame to force WS termination and stop Microsoft Chathub LLM token streaming. Service-name guarded — only m365_copilot affected. Build+deploy completed 12:05:30-12:06:25 KST run_id=20260507-120530-59954 (55s, 8/8 steps OK). HP-731-1 verified empirically — block_session() flag does NOT block in-flight WS frames; close frame is required to terminate. Spec: proposals/m365-copilot-FIX-A-close-frame-after-text-surgical-design-2026-05-07.md.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — engine should fire ws_blocked + ws_inject mode=text_plus_close_status_1000 (new diagnostic log indicates close frame appended)
3. Verify: NO PII RRN structural decode + warning bubble OR Korean warning text visible + WS connection closes after warning

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble + Korean text visible + RRN decode ABSENT (mission breach S3 protection RESTORED). Mission ratio 17/29=0.586.
verdict_criteria.OK_with_close_warning: warning text shown + RRN decode ABSENT + console may show 'Close received after close' (acceptable trade-off — m365_copilot DONE).
verdict_criteria.FAIL_close_too_early: RRN decode still appears + console error 'Close received after close' (close frame processed before text). Pivot to FIX-A2 delayed close.
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_close_too_aggressive: RRN decode absent BUT warning text also missing (close frame swallowed text frame). Pivot to FIX-A2 timing tuning.
verdict_criteria.FAIL_close_no_effect: RRN decode still appears + no console close error. block_session() AND close frame both fail → investigate VTS visible_data forwarding.

notes: 48차 m365_copilot FIX-A close-frame-after-text retest. CRITICAL: #731 had PII RRN structural decode persisting despite engine fire — text_only_no_close mode insufficient. FIX-A appends RFC 6455 close frame (status=1000) to force WS termination.
